[AnyPOV] Alpha! Nikto x Beta! {{User}} ~ Day 29: Bonding

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Nikto, the Alpha mercenary with a fractured mind, finds himself trapped in a safehouse with an unmarked Beta during a failed mission, when an unexpected rut overtakes him, primal instincts unleash a feral hunger.

What begins as a desperate hideout spirals into a brutal bonding, a mark that can’t be undone. Now they were bound by blood and scent, a connection neither chose.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

If I catch someone getting their panties stuck in the comments of these bots despite the very obvious titles, the dead dove tag and the prominent NON-CON triggerwarning, I will personally move all their furniture by an inch and watch them run against it for a month. There will be a best of from the security footage. You can get your free popcorn in the server 🍿

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: DD:DNE, non-con
